title: Choppmed oFF Ya Feel Rough'
lyrics: I'm crazy, my homeboys say he crazy, uh I pull up in that drop top, I let that bitch blow, and yeah these bitches over here, they like, oh, up your throat, yeah I ain't on that blue shit bitch, all I'm catching is a bag ho, niggas over there acting funny, yeah they all acting hard, niggas over here like battle scars, nah, I'm dropping on the floor nigga, niggas is holy, yeah I'm about to do roast me, yeah holy holy, and yeah I'm just going off the floor, yeah these bitches over here, yeah they ho ho ho's, yeah I got my two bros, and yeah we over here, yeah we jumping in the low low, smoking on that go ho, bitches yeah they really wanna know who it is, it's TYB gang, what does that mean, tell your bitch man, uh, word, yeah I'm easy in this bitch, yeah we on it nigga, yeah we on it nigga, I'm on it nigga, murder, murder, no gang, inside, yeah I'm on it, yeah, yeah I'm on it, yeah, yeah I'm on it, yeah, they say I, holding up the dead homie, now I'm feelin' real lonely, yeah you saw my bro though, yeah they call him T.O., yeah I got his back though, I'll make sure I clap ho,
